chunks.text: On Friday evening, I have just finished my long homework.
I put down my pencil and took a deep breath.
“ Have you already finished all your homework?
“ Yes, I have already finished it before dinner,” she answered with a smile.
But my brother was still reading a book.
“ Have you read that English book yet?
“ No, I have not read it yet,” he answered.
From the kitchen, my mother called, “ Is dinner ready?
” “ Yes, I have just finished making it,” she answered.
My father came home early and was watering plants in the garden.
“ I have already finished all my work for today,” he said.
